payload.summary: Tech-lead handoff for balance-comparison. Locks: (a) OpenAPI for BDS GET /api/v1/balance-dashboard + account-service GET /api/v1/accounts?customerId; (b) NO RDBMS / NO Flyway for BDS (only Redis cache + Kafka audit); (c) ADR-005 design-token consumption via Style Dictionary; (d) ADR-006 CustomerIdResolver + IborCheckFilter (resolves Security C-3); (e) ADR-007 AuditEventPublisher port + metadata-only Avro v2 (resolves Security C-2). 4 open assumptions passed forward to BE-dev / DevOps / QA.

deliverables.title: OpenAPI spec — balance-dashboard-service
deliverables.notes: GET /api/v1/balance-dashboard; OAuth2 scope accounts:read; Problem-Detail RFC 7807 errors; no customerId in URL/query/path (Security S-EARLY-003).

deliverables.title: OpenAPI delta — account-service new endpoint
deliverables.notes: GET /api/v1/accounts?customerId={uuid} — returns ALL accounts; eligibility filtering is caller responsibility (SUBDEC-002).

deliverables.title: DB-schema decision document
deliverables.notes: Explicit NO-RDBMS for BDS; Redis cache schema + Lettuce pool; audit-service JSONB-fallback decision (resolves SA open item #4); Avro v2 reference.

deliverables.title: ADR-005 — Design Token Consumption (Style Dictionary, dual-emit, CI-enforced)
deliverables.notes: Locks Style Dictionary as the tool; CI fails on stale generated outputs; Angular import order; component layer MUST prefer var(--*) over $vars.

deliverables.title: ADR-006 — CustomerIdResolver Pattern (resolves Security C-3)
deliverables.notes: CustomerIdResolver bean + IborCheckFilter; JWT sub is sole source of truth; ArchUnit rule forbids request.getHeader(X-Customer-Id) outside the filter; integration test for tampered-header → 403 + audit FORBIDDEN.

deliverables.title: ADR-007 — Audit Event Publisher (resolves Security C-2)
deliverables.notes: Hexagonal port AuditEventPublisher; metadata-only AuditEventRecord (no balance / accountId / accountNumber / accounts[] / balanceAsOf / currency); async fire-and-forget Kafka; no outbox per SA ADR-001; contract test byte-greps for forbidden field keys.

deliverables.title: Implementation notes (Maven layout, Resilience4j, Redis, feature flag, FE/DevOps cross-handoff, assumptions register, fallbacks)
deliverables.notes: 12 sections covering everything dev/devops/qa need to start work. Anchors §10 redis-pool-risk, §11 subdec-001-fallback, §12 audit-publisher-contract-test cross-referenced by db-schema and ADRs.

open_assumptions.headline: AccountInfo.balance for FIXED_DEPOSIT = principal + accrued interest
open_assumptions.trigger: Integration test against staging account-service / ledger-service
open_assumptions.fallback: Escalate to PM/BA per SUBDEC-001 fallback rule. BDS MUST NOT call ledger-service directly. EligibilityPolicy carries config-driven allow-list so type can be removed via config flip if needed (Option B). See implementation-notes §11.

open_assumptions.headline: JWT scope name = accounts:read (matches identity-service registration)
open_assumptions.fallback: Adjust @PreAuthorize literal to match registered scope; notify SA to update NFR security_jwt_scope_accounts_read.

open_assumptions.headline: Resilience4j defaults (timeout 300ms / retry 2x exp / CB 50%/100/30s / bulkhead 20) hold vs real staging account-service latency
open_assumptions.owner_to_verify: banking-qa (P1 shift-left perf test with realistic 10-account fixture by D3)
open_assumptions.trigger: Cold-cache p95 measurement; if staging p95 > 300ms, time-limiter trips on healthy calls
open_assumptions.fallback: Either (a) raise timeout to 500ms + re-baseline cold p95 to 1000ms with BA sign-off, OR (b) ask account-service team to optimize. NOT silently bump.

open_assumptions.headline: Shared Redis cluster has (a) AES-256-GCM at-rest encryption (Security C-4) AND (b) maxclients headroom for BDS pool (16 conn/pod × 2 pods baseline; up to 4 pods under HPA)
open_assumptions.trigger: Cluster CONFIG GET maxclients + CLIENT LIST | wc -l on each shard
open_assumptions.fallback: (a) Encryption: enable cluster-wide OR provision dedicated namespace. (b) Pool: reduce to 8/pod OR negotiate maxclients headroom.

security_conditions_addressed.C-2: ADR-007 — AuditEventPublisher port emits metadata-only AuditEventRecord (no balance / accountId / accountNumber / accounts[] / balanceAsOf / currency). KafkaAuditEventPublisherContractTest byte-greps serialized output for forbidden field keys (regex matches JSON-key form to avoid false positive on the 'balance' substring inside 'balance-inquiry'). Reflection test fails compilation on a future PR adding a forbidden record component. See implementation-notes §12.
security_conditions_addressed.C-3: ADR-006 — CustomerIdResolver bean (only path to derive customerId, takes Jwt argument) + IborCheckFilter (the only class permitted to read X-Customer-Id header; emits audit FORBIDDEN on tamper + 403). ArchUnit rule CustomerIdSourceRule fails build if header is read outside the filter or bound via @RequestHeader anywhere. Integration test IborGuardIntegrationTest proves tampered-header → 403 + audit FORBIDDEN + zero downstream calls.
security_conditions_addressed.C-4: PASSED FORWARD as ASSUMPTION-TL-004 — DevOps verifies shared Redis cluster has AES-256-GCM at-rest encryption by D5. Application config enables TLS in transit (spring.data.redis.ssl.enabled=true). If cluster lacks at-rest encryption, DevOps either enables cluster-wide OR provisions dedicated encrypted namespace before BDS deploys.

parallel_next.scope: Angular component implementation per Designer HI-FI. Wire Style Dictionary build (npm script tokens:build + tokens:check). Implement BalanceDashboardPage, AccountRow, StaleBanner, EmptyState, ErrorRetryBanner per Designer specs. NO client-side re-sort. Driver: meta.freshness for top banner; per-row isStale for row caption. Idempotency-Key: N/A (read-only GET). Heroicons mapping per implementation-notes §8.4.
parallel_next.expected_artifacts: frontend/src/app/features/balance-comparison/* (TS+HTML+SCSS), frontend/src/styles/tokens.{scss,css} (generated), tools/design-tokens/style-dictionary.config.cjs, component-level unit tests, Playwright E2E covering AC-001/002/003/005, OTel browser instrumentation per common-libs convention.

parallel_next.scope: Scaffold backend/balance-dashboard-service/ per Maven layout (§1). Implement hexagonal domain/application/infrastructure. Wire Resilience4j on AccountClientAdapter per §3 (TimeLimiter→CB→Retry→Bulkhead). Implement CustomerIdResolver + IborCheckFilter (ADR-006) with ArchUnit rule. Implement KafkaAuditEventPublisher (ADR-007) — async fire-and-forget, no .get(), no outbox. Implement RedisCacheRepository with SETEX (NEVER SET+EXPIRE separately). Verify ASSUMPTION-TL-001 (FIXED_DEPOSIT balance semantics) — escalate per §11 if violated. Verify ASSUMPTION-TL-002 (JWT scope name). Add listAccountsByCustomer method to common-libs/account-client-lib AND implement endpoint in account-service. Verify accounts(customer_id) index exists in account-service migrations per §7 — file new migration in account-service if absent.
parallel_next.expected_artifacts: backend/balance-dashboard-service/* (full module), backend/account-service/* extension (new endpoint + repo method), common-libs/account-client-lib extension (new interface method), unit tests for Ranker/EligibilityPolicy/CustomerIdResolver, integration tests IborGuardIntegrationTest + CacheHitAuditEmittedTest + UpstreamFailureReturns503Test, KafkaAuditEventPublisherContractTest, ArchUnit CustomerIdSourceRule.

parallel_next.scope: P1 (shift-left, parallel with BE/FE dev) — scaffold infra/helm/balance-dashboard-service/ Helm chart (2 replicas min, topologySpreadConstraints across 2 AZs, NetworkPolicy: ingress from api-gateway only / egress to account-service+Redis+Kafka+Apicurio, HPA on CPU 70% + custom metric balance_dashboard_requests_total). Wire Style Dictionary CI job (design-tokens-up-to-date per ADR-005 §2.3). Register AuditEventRecorded v2 (com.bank.compliance.audit.v2 namespace) in Apicurio by D6 (BLOCKING for D8 BDS deploy per SA-RISK-002). Verify ASSUMPTION-TL-004 (Redis at-rest encryption + maxclients headroom) by D5. Bootstrap feature flag: staging=true, prod=false. Wire Prometheus scrape from /actuator/prometheus.
parallel_next.expected_artifacts: infra/helm/balance-dashboard-service/* (Chart + values + values-prod + templates), .github/workflows/design-tokens.yml (or equivalent), Apicurio schema registration evidence (D6 deliverable), Redis cluster verification report (D5 deliverable per ASSUMPTION-TL-004).
blocking_on: SA-RISK-002 — v2 Avro schema registration by D6 (DevOps blocker — escalate to PM if D6 missed)

quality_gate_self_check.openapi_lints_clean: asserted_in_db_schema_and_openapi_authoring; spectral run is a CI gate in DevOps P1

all_acceptance_criteria_traced.AC-001: openapi GET /api/v1/balance-dashboard + ADR-006 IDOR + ADR-007 audit + implementation-notes §8 empty-state
all_acceptance_criteria_traced.AC-003: implementation-notes §3 Resilience4j + §4 Redis cache + implementation-notes §8.6 error UX
all_acceptance_criteria_traced.AC-005: ADR-005 design tokens + Designer HI-FI handoff + implementation-notes §8 frontend notes (server-authoritative rank for ARIA per SA ADR-004)

quality_gate_self_check.db_schema_reviewed_pk_fk_index_constrain: N/A — NO RDBMS for BDS (db-schema §2). account-service index verification owned by BE-dev (§7).
quality_gate_self_check.all_migrations_reversible_down_plan_docu: N/A — BDS has 0 migrations (db-schema §1). account-service's potential new index has documented DROP INDEX down plan in §7.
quality_gate_self_check.threat_model_done_STRIDE: Spoofing/Tampering/Repudiation/Info-disclosure/DoS/EoP covered across ADR-006 (S+T+EoP via IDOR), ADR-007 (R via mandatory audit), implementation-notes §3 (DoS via Resilience4j+bulkhead), §4 (info-disclosure via Redis TLS+encryption-at-rest verification).

security_conditions_addressed.C-1: DEFERRED to SA (privacy notice update before GA — post-demo, not sprint-blocking)
security_conditions_addressed.C-4: PASSED FORWARD as ASSUMPTION-TL-004 (DevOps verifies by D5)

quality_gate_self_check.money_columns_check: N/A — no RDBMS migrations authored in BDS. AccountInfo.balance is BigDecimal (inherited from money-transfer common-libs).
quality_gate_self_check.operationId_unique_across_specs: BDS endpoint operationId 'getBalanceDashboard'; account-service extension operationId 'listAccountsByCustomer' — verified non-collision with existing money-transfer openapi.

metadata.notes: TL-001 complete. 3 new ADRs (005/006/007) — ADRs 001-004 are SA-owned and untouched. ADR-006 and ADR-007 each resolve one Security early-review condition; ADR-005 implements the Designer dual-emit contract. The handoff splits 3-way (FE / BE / DevOps P1) — no sequential blocking between them. Critical D6 milestone: Apicurio v2 schema registration (DevOps owns; BDS deploy on D8 depends on it). Critical D5 milestones: Redis cluster verification (ASSUMPTION-TL-004) + audit-service storage path JSONB confirmation (already decided in db-schema §4).
